The surface of the facility is solid, such as asphalt or concrete.
The facility has staff on-site for assistance and questions.
The facility has a shuttle available to nearby destinations, like an airport.
The facility is wheelchair accessible.

arrival.text: Pull up in front of the hotel and head to the front desk and show the agent your SpotHero parking pass. You will fill then out a reservation form and vehicle details, and given a ticket to place on your dashboard.
Front desk staff will direct to parking area for long term stays. You may park anywhere not marked as ""Reserved"".
Gather your belongings and head to the shuttle pickup area.

departure.text: When arriving back to MCO, collect your luggage and head to “Ground Level Transportation” on Level 1 which is one floor below baggage claim. Contact the hotel for shuttle pickup: Text/WhatsApp Front Desk: 407-845-9273 or Call 407-858-0801
Once you have returned to the hotel, simply leave when you're ready to go!

common.title: Hyatt House Orlando Airport - Uncovered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 5472 Gateway Village Cir. This is the Hyatt House Orlando Airport - Uncovered Self Park lot, operated by McKibbon Hotel Management. It is located on the West side of Gateway Village Cir. between N Frontage Rd. and N Frontage Rd.

The surface of the facility is solid, such as asphalt or concrete.
The facility has staff on-site for assistance and questions.
The facility has a shuttle available to nearby destinations, like an airport.

arrival.text: Upon arrival, please stop in the lobby to check in for your parking reservation. At the front desk, present your booking confirmation or email to sign in and obtain a parking pass to display on your car's dashboard.
Park in a non-reserved space, be sure to secure your vehicle.

Gather your luggage and board the shuttle. The shuttle departs from the facility to MCO Airport every hour, on the hour. (E.g., 9:00, 10:00, 11:00, etc.)

PLEASE NOTE: The shuttle does not run between the hours of 1 pm to 2 pm.

departure.text:
Once back at MCO airport and you’ve collected your luggage, please give us a call to request pickup; at 407-240-5000. Shuttle runs from 5am to 10pm daily.

PLEASE NOTE: The shuttle does not run between the hours of 1 pm to 2 pm.

Please proceed to the shuttle pick-up station. Hotel Shuttles pick up at the Ground Transportation Level (Level 1) of Terminals A and B. Terminal A: Commercial Lane spaces A1-A4 & A42-A45. Terminal B: Commercial Lane spaces B1-B4 & B40.

Terminal C is not serviced, but customers can take the tram to Terminals A & B for pickup.
Simply leave when you're ready to go!

common.title: La Quinta Inn & Suites Orlando Airport North - Uncovered Self Park
common.operator_display_name: La Quinta Inn & Suites Orlando Airport North Parking
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 7160 N Frontage Rd. This is the Wyndham Orlando Airport North lot, operated by La Quinta Inn & Suites Orlando Airport North. It is located on the West side of N Frontage Rd. between Forbes Pl. and Gateway Village Cir. You can only access this location by traveling South on N Frontage Rd.
restrictions: PLEASE NOTE: The shuttle does NOT run between the hours of 1 pm and 2 pm.
We don’t pick up from terminal C or Train station. Customers can get the tram to terminal A&B where we pick up.
We recommend giving us a call at 407-240-5000, 24hrs in advance to let us know you’ll need a ride on the shuttle.

The surface of the facility is solid, such as asphalt or concrete.
Users may enter and exit the facility more than one time.
The facility has staff on-site for assistance and questions.
The facility is wheelchair accessible.

arrival.text: When you arrive at the hotel, note your license plate information, and proceed to the front desk. Show the hotel front desk your parking reservation, receive a validation code, and register your vehicle via the QR code at the front desk. QR code registration includes license plate information, phone number, duration of stay, and validation code.
You may park anywhere that doesn't say "Reserved".

Our shuttle departs from the hotel to the airport on average every 30 min on the hour and ½ hour until 1 pm, then upon request, still trying to follow the 30 min window time. First arrived, first served. The shuttle will leave if full, and will not wait as other guests are expecting it to be on time

departure.text: Pick-up from the airport is upon request only. Call 407-813-5003 after you retrieve your luggage to coordinate a pick-up location.
When you are ready to leave, drive to the gate, and the gate will open, and you're free to go!

common.title: Holiday Inn MCO - Uncovered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location on T G Lee Blvd. This is the Holiday Inn Orlando-International Airport garage, operated by PMC. It is located on the South side of T G Lee Blvd. between S Semoran Blvd. and Eagle Watch Dr. You can only access this location traveling East on T G Lee Blvd.

You may park anywhere that doesn't say "Reserved".
Gather your belongings and proceed to board the shuttle.

departure.text: When you return to Orlando, call (407) 240-1000 to arrange return shuttle pick-up.

Visit the valet and display your SpotHero parking pass, either printed or on a mobile device, along with the ticket you pulled upon entry. The valet will hand you a validated chaser ticket to use at the exit gate.
Insert the ticket you received upon entry followed by the validated chaser ticket you received from the valet. The gate will open and you're free to go!

arrival.text: No need to pull a ticket! Pull up to our facility entrance and scan your Spot Hero QR code to open the gate.
You will be directed where to park.
The Parking Spot shuttle will pick you up directly at your vehicle to take you to the airport.

departure.text: Upon return, please claim your luggage and follow the pick up instructions on the Locator Slip provided by your shuttle driver.
The shuttle will bring you to your car. From there, follow the signs to the exit.

common.title: The Parking Spot - Covered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 5500 Hazeltine National Dr. This is The Parking Spot. It is located on the South side of Hazeltine National Dr. The entrance is marked with a black and yellow 'The Parking Spot' sign marked with white and yellow lettering.
restrictions: When you return home, please call The Parking Spot for shuttle pick-up and proceed to Terminal A, between spaces 34 and 37. For Terminal B, a shuttle will pick you up between Spaces 36 and 39.
Complimentary bottled water is available at checkout.
If you park outside your reservation times, you will be charged for each additional day upon exit.
Please have your QR code ready to scan when you arrive. This helps us get you parked and on your way in no time. Thank you!
The Parking Spot reservations may be changed up to 1 hour prior to your scheduled arrival time.

arrival.text: Shuttle typically runs every 30 minutes. If necessary, call 407-856-0100 to schedule your shuttle pick up. Once you have arrived at this facility, please visit the front desk and present your SpotHero parking pass to the front desk associate.
The front desk associate will show you where to park your vehicle.

Gather your belongings and head over to the shuttle pick up area. The shuttle will take you to the airport.   PLEASE NOTE: The shuttle only runs after you call and schedule it between the hours of 5am-1am.

departure.text: When arriving back to the airport, please gather your luggage and call 407-856-0100 to schedule your shuttle pick up.
Board the shuttle.
Once you are ready to go, you may simply leave!

arrival.text: Call the hotel the night prior to reserve a seat on the shuttle. The shuttle departs on the hour and the half hour. When you arrive at this facility, you must visit the front desk associate. Show them your SpotHero parking pass and they will have you complete the parking form for the hotel. Once completed, they will direct you where to park your vehicle.
This lot is monitored by license plate ONLY.  Please make sure your license plate matches the information in the SpotHero app.
Gather your belongings and head over to the shuttle pick up area.  The shuttle will take you to the airport.

departure.text: Once you have arrived back to the airport, please gather all your luggage and belongings and proceed to ground transportation.
Once at ground transportation, then call the hotel at 407.852.0844 for shuttle service.
The shuttle will take you back to your vehicle.
Once you are ready to go, you may simply leave!

common.title: Home2Suites MCO - Uncovered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at Hazeltine National Dr. This is the Home2Suites MCO lot. It is located on the NW side of Hazeltine National Dr. between Shadowridge Dr. and S Semoran Dr. The entrance is marked with a black 'Home2Suites' sign marked with green and white lettering.
restrictions: PLEASE NOTE: the shuttle runs on the hour and half hour Monday - Sunday, 4:30A - 1A.
Shuttle service is not wheelchair accessible and does not have a lift.

You may park anywhere that doesn't say "Reserved".
The shuttle will pick you up at your vehicle and hand you a boarding card with pick up instructions.

departure.text: When you return to the airport, text "self park" to 407-848-1004 to have a shuttle dispatched to you.
When exiting, scan your QR Code again at the box with the red flashing lights.
The gate will open and you're free to go!

arrival.text: Upon arriving at the Omni Airport Parking facility, proceed through the Parking Dropoff lane with your vehicle, and scan your reservations QR code for the machine to process and grant you access.
Staff on site will assist in guiding you to a parking space and aid with your luggage.
The complimentary shuttle busses run to and from the airport in intervals every 15-25 minutes.

departure.text: When arriving into MCO, please proceed to Level 1, ground transportation to board the Omni shuttle back to the lot. Our shuttles will pick up from A11-A13 if you're on the A terminal, B11-13 if you're on the B terminal and C282 if you're on the C terminal.

When exiting, scan your QR Code again at the box with the red flashing lights. Anything outside a 1 hour grace period allocated to all reservations will be charged at our exit gate @ $12/day plus tax.
Simply leave when you're ready to go!

common.title: Omni Airport Parking - Uncovered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 7640 Narcoossee Rd. This lot is operated Omni Airport Parking. It is located on the right hand side of the street. You can only access this location traveling Southeast on Narcoossee Rd.
restrictions: Any additional questions, you may email info@omniairportparking.com.
During times of peak occupancy, you may be asked to valet your vehicle and leave your keys with staff.

Omni provides guests with a 1-hour grace free of charge from the indicated exit day and time. Additional days and extensions will be assessed at the exit gate and will be billed at $15.23/day inclusive of taxes.

The gate will open and you're free to go!

common.title: Gold Park Orlando - Uncovered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 7350 Narcoossee Rd. This is the Gold Park Orlando lot, operated by VPNE. It is located on the Southwest side of the Narcoossee Rd. between Lee Vista Blvd. and Dakota Dr. You can only access this location traveling Southeast on Narcoossee Rd.

arrival.text: Show the valet your SpotHero Parking Pass, either printed or on a mobile device.
The valet will hand you a ticket, confirm how long you plan on parking, and will park your car. You must have this ticket in order to exit.
After parking, head to the shuttle pick up area and board the shuttle to the airport. The shuttle runs on demand, 24/7 to Terminal A at MCO.

departure.text: When you arrive back to MCO, please call 407-826-1076 to confirm shuttle pick up. The shuttle will arrive on ground transportation level.
When you're ready to go, show the valet the ticket you received upon arrival and your SpotHero Parking Pass. The valet will scan your pass, and your car will be retrieved.

common.title: Drive and Park Orlando Airport - Uncovered Valet

It is located on the Northwest side of the street. between Dakota Dr. and Las Vistas Dr. You can only access this location by traveling Northeast on Narcoossee Rd.
restrictions: The shuttle runs every 20-30 minutes between the airport and the facility.
